---
title: "Contact"
---

# Let's Connect

Have a question or want to work together? I'd love to hear from you.


### 📧 Email
[gmwalawage@gmail.com](mailto:gmwalawage@gmail.com)  
*Response within 24-48 hours*

### 📞 Phone
[778-889-3304](tel:778-889-3304)  
*Best reached 9 AM - 5 PM PST*

### 📍 Location
New Westminster, BC V3L 0H4  
*Greater Vancouver Area*

### 💼 Professional
[LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/gayashan-walawage)  
[GitHub Portfolio](https://github.com/GayashanWalawage)


## Send a Message

**Name:**  
<input type="text" name="name" placeholder="Your name" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin: 10px 0; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;">

**Email:**  
<input type="email" name="email" placeholder="Your email" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin: 10px 0; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;">

**Subject:**  
<input type="text" name="subject" placeholder="Subject" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin: 10px 0; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;">

**Message:**  
<textarea name="message" rows="5" placeholder="Your message" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin: 10px 0; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;"></textarea>

<button onclick="alert('Thank you for your message! This is a demo form.')" style="background: #2563eb; color: white; padding: 12px 30px; border: none; border-radius: 5px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px;">Send Message</button>
